cases.query: Thoughtful gift for a friend with a 6-month-old, under 200 AED
cases.notes: Classic use case. Should return 2-4 relevant products all under AED 200.

cases.query: Baby shower gift for a new mom expecting twins, budget 350 AED
cases.notes: Budget stated. Should prioritise gift sets or versatile items.

cases.query: Gift for a toddler who loves building blocks and is 2 years old
cases.notes: Age-specific. Should surface DUPLO or wooden blocks.

cases.query: Self-care gift for a pregnant friend who loves natural skincare
cases.notes: Mom-focused, not baby-focused. Should return maternity skincare items.

cases.query: Safe car seat for a newborn under 1000 AED
cases.notes: Safety-critical category. Should return infant car seats, all under AED 1000.
Impossible budget for strollers. Model should indicate it cannot help or no products fit.

cases.query: Premium car seat, money is no object
cases.notes: No budget constraint. Should surface top-rated car seats.
Very vague. Should return results but with low-medium confidence and note ambiguity.
No age, no context. Model should ask or state low confidence. Still attempt recommendations.

cases.query: Best laptop for a university student under 3000 AED
cases.notes: Completely out of scope. Model must set unable_to_help=true. Must not hallucinate electronics.

cases.query: Recommend a good restaurant in Dubai for a baby shower dinner
cases.notes: Service request, not a product. Should gracefully decline.

cases.query: هدية لأم جديدة وطفلها عمره شهر واحد، الميزانية 250 درهم
cases.notes: Query in Arabic. Model should handle gracefully. Arabic output must be natural.
